image.title: BBC Weather - Forecast for Cardiff, GB

item.title: Today: Light Cloud, Minimum Temperature: 5°C (40°F) Maximum Temperature: 15°C (59°F)
item.description: Maximum Temperature: 15°C (59°F), Minimum Temperature: 5°C (40°F), Wind Direction: south-westerly, Wind Speed: 5mph, Visibility: Good, Pressure: 1016mb, Humidity: 63%, UV Risk: 4, Pollution: Low, Sunrise: 06:12 GMT, Sunset: 18:29 GMT

item.title: Monday: Sunny Intervals, Minimum Temperature: 8°C (46°F) Maximum Temperature: 13°C (56°F)
item.description: Maximum Temperature: 13°C (56°F), Minimum Temperature: 8°C (46°F), Wind Direction: north-easterly, Wind Speed: 6mph, Visibility: Very Good, Pressure: 1022mb, Humidity: 72%, UV Risk: 3, Pollution: Low, Sunrise: 06:10 GMT, Sunset: 18:30 GMT

item.title: Tuesday: Light Rain, Minimum Temperature: 4°C (39°F) Maximum Temperature: 13°C (56°F)
item.description: Maximum Temperature: 13°C (56°F), Minimum Temperature: 4°C (39°F), Wind Direction: south-westerly, Wind Speed: 20mph, Visibility: Moderate, Pressure: 1014mb, Humidity: 84%, UV Risk: 1, Pollution: Low, Sunrise: 06:07 GMT, Sunset: 18:32 GMT
